goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 20:15'.
The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 20:15
The train should go to birmingham new street and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get travel time
